title: gaultheria novaguineensis var. pascua
intro: Gaultheria novaguineensis var. pascua, also known as Paska Gaultheria, is a variant of the Gaultheria novaguineensis plant, a species of flowering plant in the heath family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Gaultheria novaguineensis var. pascua include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Gaultheria novaguineensis var. pascua can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
